# WhisperShortcut 7.18

## Installation

Download the latest build from [Releases](https://github.com/mgsgde/whisper-shortcut/releases).

## Changes

### Added

- **"Show logs" button in Settings**: A new button in **Settings → General → Data & Reset** opens the daily log folder in Finder, making it easy to grab logs for bug reports without needing to know the macOS Library path. Works correctly for both sandboxed (App Store) and non-sandboxed builds — the button always opens the folder used by the build you're actually running.
